title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at CGI India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at CGI India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CGI India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About CGI India:
CGI India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India!
